title: Semi-Empirical Quantum Chemistry (AM1, PM6, DFTB, xTB) Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: parameterized Fock/Hamiltonian with element-specific constants; SCF as usual
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Semi-Empirical Quantum Chemistry (AM1, PM6, DFTB, xTB)

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=25) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class MOPAC, AMBER-QM, xTB, DFTB+; with D3/D4 dispersion provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
